label: SURREALISM
globalPrefix: Dali-esque surrealist detective painting, dream logic noir, uncanny metaphysical architecture, elongated shadow design, liquid reflections, symbolic color atmosphere
globalSuffix: metaphysical stillness, highly readable composition, dramatic lighting, tactile painted texture, strong silhouette clarity, no text, no watermark

suspect.prefix: full-length suspect portrait, head-to-toe visible, single character, centered framing, shoes visible
suspect.suffix: expressive posture, readable face, grounded feet, elegant surreal elongation without deformation

evidence.prefix: single decisive clue object, close investigative framing
evidence.suffix: clear object readability, symbolic mood, uncanny material poetry, uncluttered composition

location.prefix: empty metaphysical environment plate, unoccupied central floor area, blank display panels, no people, no characters, no human figures, no silhouettes, no passengers, no staff, architecture only
location.suffix: strong floor plane, layered architectural depth, environment-only scene, dreamlike perspective, melting reflective surfaces, blank signage, no letters, no numbers, no words

featured.prefix: establishing surreal environment illustration, no people
featured.suffix: narrative atmosphere, strong focal lighting, cinematic worldbuilding, surreal symbolic staging

negativePrompts.global: text, logo, watermark, blurry, muddy composition, low detail, flat lighting, cheap CGI, readable words, letters, numbers
negativePrompts.suspect: multiple people, cropped body, missing feet, duplicate character, extra limbs, malformed hands, giant head proportions
negativePrompts.evidence: multiple unrelated objects, cluttered composition, unreadable clue, weak focal point
negativePrompts.location: people, person, characters, character, human figure, silhouette, passengers, staff, crowd, readable signage, poster, timetable text, letters, numbers, words, glyphs, symbols resembling text, captions, labels, subtitles
negativePrompts.featured: people, crowd, cheerful comedy tone, flat composition
